content.en:
Qinglian Giant City.

Ye Tian began to inquire about the information about the Half-Tooth Secret Domain, and he needed to understand it clearly before entering the Half-Tooth Secret Domain.

And the half-tooth secret domain was not a secret, so Ye Tian quickly found out clearly.

The reason why the Half Tooth Secret Domain has attracted countless Peak Legendary Realm Lords is because the Half Tooth Secret Domain has the hope that the Fifth Peak Legendary Realm Lord will break through to the Half-Step Eternal Master Realm.

In the Half-Tooth Secret Domain, there is an ancient secret spring that makes even the fifth-level peak Legendary Realm lords crazy.

The Ancient Secret Spring can temper the body of the peak Legendary Realm Lord, so that the Supreme Legendary Body can be elevated to the consummation realm, and become a half-step eternal master, the consummation of the Supreme Legendary Body is the most basic condition.

Even if the Supreme Legend Body is complete, the Ancient Secret Spring can also increase the strength of the body and increase the level of life a little.

The Half Tooth Secret Realm not only has the Ancient Secret Spring, but also an Ancient Secret Tree, and the Ancient Secret Tree is a treasure tree that even the Eternal Masters want.

Any leaf of the Ancient Secret Tree is worth unimaginable, and a single Ancient Secret Leaf can save the life of the Peak Legendary Realm Lord, and can form an Ancient Secret Cover, which is enough to resist the attack of the half-step Eternal Master.

And an ancient secret tree, you can imagine how many ancient secret leaves.

Therefore, the value of an Ancient Secret Tree is too great for even ordinary Eternal Controllers to be tempted.

However, those peak legendary realm lords who enter the half-tooth secret realm can't take away the entire ancient secret tree, and the half-tooth master is not allowed, but every peak legendary realm lord can take away an ancient secret leaf, which is also a good harvest.

In addition, there are some places in the Half Tooth Secret Realm that are conducive to cultivation.

It's a pity that once the peak Legendary Realm lord enters the Halftooth Secret Domain, he can only stay for a few years and can't stay for a long time.

"The Ancient Tooth Secret Domain is good, but my Supreme Legendary Body is still very early from consummation, if I go to the Half Tooth Secret Domain now, I am afraid that I may not be able to directly ascend to the Consummation Realm, and after cultivating to completely reach the fifth level of the peak Legendary Realm Lord Realm, I will go to the Half Tooth Secret Domain~." Ye Tian decided.

Subsequently, Ye Tian formulated the next cultivation plan.

The first is to cultivate the fusion of time and space to the peak realm as soon as possible, and step into the fourth level of the peak Legendary Realm Lord realm.

Second, collect the blood of the powerful Boundary River life, absorb and refine it with the secret of swallowing, and strengthen your own bloodline and life level.

These are the two most important cultivation plans at the moment, and as for the other cultivation plans, they have to be put at the back.

The blood of the life of the powerful Boundary River, it is still relatively easy to collect in the Boundary River, but what he needs is real essence blood, so the price is not low.

Although he can replicate those powerful Boundary River lifeforms, it seems that if he really strips out the blood, it will also turn into ashes, which is one of the flaws of the replication talent, so he still has to rely on the true Boundary River Life Essence Blood.

Ye Tian started collecting in the Qinglian Giant City, and it took a little time to collect the essence blood of a top-notch Boundary River Life Xuanlin Black Armor Giant Beast, the Xuanlin Black Armor Giant Beast was an incomparably powerful Boundary River Life, and it was considered powerful among the half-step Eternal Controllers.

Once, more than ten half-step Eternal Masters besieged a Xuanlin Black-Armored Behemoth before killing it.

After acquiring this Xuanlin Black Armor Giant Beast Essence Blood, Ye Tian came back to retreat to refine this Essence Blood and try the effect of swallowing the secret.

This secret art is so difficult to comprehend, it must be extraordinary.

But what the real effect is, you have to really practice to try.

Ye Tian swallowed the essence blood of the black-scaled Xuanjia Giant Beast in one gulp, and began to operate the Swallowing Secret Technique.

The Secret Technique of Devouring turned into a piece of heaven and earth, and the essence blood of the black-armored giant beast of the Xuan-scale black-armored beast turned into a small black-armored giant beast of the Xuanscale, roaring and rushing in this piece of heaven and earth.

Thundered!!!!

The collision of the giant beast transformed into the essence blood of the Xuanlin Black Armor Behemoth made the Swallowing Secret Secret Art Heaven and Earth tremble, but it finally stabilized.

Gradually, this piece of essence blood was consumed and refined little by little, acting on Ye Tian's whole body.

With the passage of time, Ye Tian's life level was rapidly improving, and his body strength was constantly skyrocketing.

You must know that at his current level, it is extremely difficult to improve his strength at all, but after cultivating the secret of swallowing, he can improve his strength so quickly, which is simply incredible.

"The preciousness of this secret art is far beyond my imagination, and ordinary eternal masters are afraid that they will not be able to create it at all. It shouldn't have been created by the half-tooth master, he wouldn't have put such a precious secret art inheritance here, and I practiced this secret art, and the half-tooth master didn't appear, or even left any information, which is not normal in itself. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

However, he got the benefits, it was enough, and he didn't want to think too much.

After a long time, Ye Tian completely refined the essence blood of the Xuanlin Black Armor Giant Beast, and his life level increased a lot, and his body strength also increased a lot.

This is just a piece of essence blood, if he absorbs and refines a large amount of the essence blood of the top realm river life, his life level is afraid that it will surpass those top realm river lifeforms, second only to the eternal master.

In the following days, Ye Tian collected the essence blood of the life of the top boundary river while cultivating space-time fusion.

He has a mastery-level time ancestor and a mastery-level space ancestor, so the speed of space-time fusion is still extremely fast, plus he has been cultivating for a long time, it won't be long before he completely cultivates space-time fusion to the peak realm.

In the blink of an eye, another three boundary river years have passed.

At this time, Ye Tian had already collected a lot of the essence blood of the top Realm River lifeforms, and they had used the secret of swallowing to refine it.

At this moment, his life level has far surpassed before, and his physical strength has far surpassed before.

With a single round of physical fitness and life level, he has surpassed those top realm river lifeforms.

Moreover, his space-time fusion is about to reach its peak.

this day. (Zhao's)

Ye Tian was in the midst of penance, and time and space were completely fused.

Airplanes!!!!

All the power in the body was transformed into space-time control power, and the body became more powerful.

At this moment, he had reached the true fourth level peak Legendary Realm Lord realm.

Moreover, he was only one step away from the fifth-level peak Legendary Realm Lord realm.

Because his own will has reached the eighth order, and he has also created a half-step space-time control technique, as long as he creates a real space-time control technique, he will be a fifth-level peak Legendary Realm Lord.

For him, it is not difficult to create a space-time control technique now, it just takes a little more time.

But if it was about combat power, he was no worse than an ordinary fifth-level peak Legendary Realm Lord.

In the Void Zone, his strength is almost invincible, except of course for those Eternal Masters and the Whitebearded Old Man. _
